tool_purpose: Anything V4 is a latent diffusion model for generating high-quality, highly detailed anime-style images with just a few prompts. It supports danbooru tags to generate images and can be used just like any other Stable Diffusion model. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Text-to-Image. API call: StableDiffusionPipeline.from_pretrained('andite/anything-v4.0', torch_dtype=torch.float16).
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
